name: Physical View — Deployment Topology
diagram_source:
graph LR
  subgraph Device ["Android Device (User's Phone)"]
    App["Family Finance APK"]
    RoomDB[("Room / SQLite\n(local file)")]
    App -->|"read/write"| RoomDB
  end
  subgraph Cloud ["Cloud (Post-MVP)"]
    Supabase["Supabase\n(PostgreSQL)"]
  end
  App -.->|"WorkManager sync\n(post-MVP only)"| Supabase
  style Cloud stroke-dasharray: 5 5

elements.name: Android Device
elements.description: Single deployment target for MVP. Application runs entirely on the user's personal phone.

elements.name: Room/SQLite (local file)
elements.description: Primary and only data store for MVP. File is private to the app sandbox — no external access.

elements.name: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
elements.description: Post-MVP cloud backend. WorkManager will push synced rows when connectivity is available. Not present in MVP build.
